comment.body:
We have a line-in-the-sand functioning local vanna flip at 6906/00 after 11.30am
This is pretty much can provide reversion opportunity, but the convexity is low, so wait for confirmation. Before the noon, it can be broken.
The longer the spot keeps being above the centroid, the more downside hedge will decay, and provide some support
